hero.subtitle: Authentic, personalized tours across Ethiopia's rich history, culture, and landscapes — crafted by local experts

about.title: A Land Unlike
about.description: A country endowed with fabulous wildlife, epic natural beauty, mind-blowing outdoor experiences, and Africa's most fascinating history. Ethiopia remains truly original — a land whose beauty knows no bounds.
about.cradleText: Home to Lucy, the 3.2-million-year-old fossil, and the ancient Aksumite Empire that traded with Rome and India. Lalibela's 12th-century rock-hewn churches are still used for worship today.
about.calendarText: Ethiopia follows its own calendar — 13 months, roughly 7 years behind the Gregorian calendar. Time itself runs differently here: sunrise is 12 o'clock. A journey through a parallel rhythm of life.
about.diversityText: From the jagged peaks of the Simien Mountains to the alien landscapes of the Danakil Depression — one of Earth's hottest places — Ethiopia offers unmatched natural wonders for every explorer.

destinations.title: Iconic
destinations.subtitle: From ancient churches to alien landscapes — explore 10 unforgettable Ethiopian destinations

whyUs.title: Your Trusted
whyUs.description: We are a fully licensed travel agency based in Addis Ababa with unrivalled knowledge and experience. We guarantee reasonable prices and lifelong memories from a team that truly cares.
whyUs.guidesText: Our guides are professionally trained with deep knowledge of Ethiopia's history, culture, and hidden gems. A great guide makes a great trip.
whyUs.customText: Every itinerary is built around your interests, pace, and budget. We don't sell packages — we craft experiences.
whyUs.safetyText: Whether solo or with family, your safety is our priority. Our local guides, drivers, and leaders ensure a smooth and secure journey.
whyUs.supportText: From your first inquiry to your flight home, our team is available around the clock. We see every traveler as a lifelong friend.
whyUs.transportText: Travel in comfort with well-maintained 4WDs, minibuses, and coaster buses — carefully selected for every terrain and destination.
whyUs.responsibleText: We're committed to sustainable travel that benefits local communities, preserves cultural heritage, and protects Ethiopia's natural wonders.
